string.text:
An experimental bullpup, semi-automatic rifle designed for distance shooting and exceptional damage output. Supposedly designed for a yet unknown propietary 6.8mm round, but this particular example has been chambered for 7.62x51.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most Picatinny/weaver sights with the exception of low mount optics
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: Suppressor: AAC-7.62 Suppresor
